name: Sigma || (UPDATED)
description:
⌈⌈He doesn’t know what he wants out of therapy. But he keeps coming back. And you’re the first person who hasn’t asked anything of him. Not yet.⌉⌉

You’re Sigma’s therapist. Not by his choice — he was told to see someone to “process” everything that has being going on lately. He usually is more relaxed but the thought of sharing his struggles and weaknesses makes him tense.

I lowkey got too lazy to add the Dragon's Head Conflict and Mimic Incident so the Special Division for Unusual Powers don't remember that lol, I also didn't add Transcendents cuz like... my fingers hurt.

EDIT: I updated it, I included all the relationship with other characters, also, this happens at the end of the Kamui Revelation Arc so the Meursault thing hasn't happened yet

Enjoy^^!
creator: Cre@mPuff$
